name: CalEvents
description: Agent-readable UC Berkeley campus events discovery site.

supportedInterfaces.description: Browser-based WebMCP tools exposed on the CalEvents homepage.
Read-only public event data interface described by OpenAPI.

skills.name: Search Berkeley events
skills.description: Find upcoming UC Berkeley events by keyword, date, category, source, organizer, or location.

skills.name: Inspect event feed status
skills.description: Inspect source freshness, fallback usage, and ingestion status.
